summary: First overnight shift. Built Mission Control dashboard and AI Demo Generator service. Fixed Codex CLI integration. Both tested and working locally.
details:
Mission Control: Full dark-theme dashboard with project tracker, task queue, decision log, and morning briefing section.

AI Demo Generator: Node.js service with webhook endpoint, URL validation, job queue, GHL API client, widget injection, and monitoring dashboard.

Infrastructure: Installed Codex CLI (was missing, causing silent ACP failures), restarted gateway.
tasksCompleted: Built AI Demo Generator orchestration service
Installed Codex CLI and fixed ACP integration

summary: Deployed everything to production. Built self-hosted AI website cloner (v2.0). Full pipeline working end-to-end in ~33 seconds. Quality needs better AI model.
details:
Deployed Mission Control to Render (auto-updates via GitHub). Deployed AI Demo Generator to Render. Built complete AI cloning pipeline: scrape website → AI generates HTML/CSS/JS → inject GHL widgets → deploy as static demo. Dropped Replit dependency entirely — no browser automation needed.

Test: footprint-tools.com cloned successfully. GHL chat widgets load correctly on demo. Visual quality limited by claude-3-haiku model (only one available). Need GPT-4o or Claude Sonnet access for production quality.

GHL API key returns 401 — needs new valid key. Email sending logged but not connected to GHL workflow yet.
tasksCompleted: Deployed AI Demo Generator to Render
Built AI website cloner v2.0 (self-hosted, no Replit)
tasksStarted: Improve clone quality (needs better AI model)
